description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, slightly trapezoidal silhouette with a woven pink exterior that creates a subtle checkered pattern. The surface is composed of interlaced strips, giving it a textured, basket-like appearance. The edges are bordered with a dark trim, providing a sharp contrast to the vibrant pink body. A slim wrist strap is attached to one side, secured with a small metallic clasp, and a zipper closure runs along the top edge for secure storage. The overall design is sleek and modern, with no visible logos or excessive embellishments. The handbag appears lightweight and compact, suitable for carrying small personal items in an urban setting.
description: A compact, pink woven handbag with a checkered pattern, dark trim, and a slim wrist strap. Features a top zipper closure and a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pink woven checkered surface and dark trim.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the slim depth, dark edge, and attached wrist strap with metallic clasp.
description_view_2: Back view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the woven pink pattern and dark trim.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the slim edge without the visible wrist strap.
attribute_strap_type: Single slim wrist strap, short length, non-adjustable, attached with a small metal clasp to one side.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure along the top edge, with a small metallic zipper pull.
attribute_pattern: Woven checkered pattern created by interlaced pink strips.
